name: Chris McDaniel
subject: BREAKING: Cindy Hyde-Smith voted for Clinton in 2008
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
It’s has been confirmed. Cindy Hyde-Smith, the Senator hand-picked by the Washington establishment, voted for Hillary Clinton in the 2008 primary. Breitbart News reports, “A previous leader of the Democratic party confirmed on Thursday that Sen. Cindy Hyde-Smith (R-MS) voted for Hillary Clinton in the 2008 Democratic presidential primary.” Peter, It’s has been confirmed. Cindy Hyde-Smith, the Senator hand-picked by the Washington establishment, voted for Hillary Clinton in the 2008 primary. Breitbart News reports, “A previous leader of the Democratic party confirmed on Thursday that Sen. Cindy Hyde-Smith (R-MS) voted for Hillary Clinton in the 2008 Democratic presidential primary.” Rickey Cole, the previous head of the Mississippi Democratic Party -- of which Hyde-Smith was a member of until she opportunistically switched in 2010 -- confirmed it on Facebook this Thursday.” You can read the whole story here. [http://www.breitbart.com/big-government/2018/06/29/gop-sen-cindy-hyde-smith-voted-for-hillary-clinton-in-2008/] This confirms what every one of us already knew: Cindy Hyde-Smith lied to us. She has tried to say she didn’t vote for Clinton or Obama in 2008 or that she didn’t remember who she voted for -- but now we know for sure where her loyalties lie. This is why this FEC end-of-quarter deadline is so important. We have to stop Cindy Hyde-Smith here and now, and make sure Mississippi is represented by a real conservative. The choice is clear: Someone who has a proven record of lifelong conservatism, or a Clinton-supporting, establishment-backed liberal. name: Tina Smith
subject: Last chance to make a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We're five hours away and still falling short.

If Donald Trump appoints another Justice, conservatives believe they will have the votes to overturn _Roe vs. Wade_ , undo all our progress on voting rights, and enact every right-wing policy they've ever dreamed up. And if Republicans keep control of the Senate -- they could be right. **The only defense we have is taking back the Senate with a strong group of progressive Democrats to keep Trump and Republicans in check. That 's why I'm coming to you now.** **[Our biggest FEC deadline of the campaign is in just 5 hours and we're still short of our goal by $2,359. Can you pitch in before midnight and help make sure we have the resources to keep this seat blue in 2018? disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, We are only a few short hours away from the FEC campaign finance deadline at midnight. I’ve put out hundreds of phone calls, texts, and emails today to ensure we make our goal. Right now? I need to find just 30 more donors tonight and we’ll make our goal. I know we can do it. This is our moment. Tonight is the LAST quarterly campaign finance report I will submit before the GOP Primary. Let me try to convey why this is so important. Claire McCaskill, Josh Hawley, the GOP establishment, and the media are watching to see how much I will report. I must be able to deliver impressive numbers in order to win the media narrative and show that I am the viable, grassroots candidate to beat Claire McCaskill this November. As you know, Josh Hawley and Claire McCaskill have access to a roster of well-connected donors in Washington D.C. It is essential that I build a MASSIVE campaign war chest to take down Josh Hawley in August. Ugh... Forgive me for rambling, Friend. I am feeling the pressure on this goal. We are close. But I need your help. This is the most important fundraising deadline of the campaign. I am asking you to please donate the most generous amount that you can today. If you have held off on making a donation, have not signed up for a small recurring contribution, or know that you will be donating more down the road... Now is the time to make that donation. name: Thank you from Team Kaine
subject: Derek Willis: Valued member of Team Kaine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, we can't thank you enough for being on this team.

Here at Kaine HQ, there are staff and volunteers working around the clock to get ready for Election Day - and you, just by reading this email, are a part of that. **Whether you donate to every email you get, or just open 'em up to stay in the loop, we're glad you're here.**

June brought with it a lot of important milestones for the campaign: getting a Republican opponent, the first major fundraising deadline of the general election, and Democrats all across the Commonwealth getting nominated to join the ticket for [November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f125d/3e0906/68275190/3e35bb13/2992555852/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-tim?source=20180701_1_PET_TEAM_Thank-you&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180701_1_PET_TEAM_Thank-you")

**Thank you for stepping up along the way, donating, and keeping up with the field team on the ground.**

We promise a lot more to come this month and beyond. We'll be opening up our online store soon, campaigning with the other Virginia Democratic nominees, and dropping more notes about Tim's love of the harmonica and the outdoors.

Of course, we'll also be in a challenging general election. But with your help, this team is going to make sure Tim's positive message of a _Virginia that works for all_ wins out over our opponent's rhetoric of hate and division.

**Take a moment to let us know you 're in it with Tim for the long haul!**

[Sign here to commit to being on Team Kaine through the general election.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f125d/3e0906/68275190/3e35bb12/2992555852/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-tim?source=20180701_1_PET_TEAM_Thank-you&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Sign+here+to+commit+to+being+on+Team+Kai&utm_campaign=20180701_1_PET_TEAM_Thank-you")

Thanks, Derek.

Here at Kaine HQ, there are staff and volunteers working around the clock to get ready for Election Day - and you, just by reading this email, are a part of that. Whether you donate to every email you get, or just open 'em up to stay in the loop, we're glad you're here. June brought with it a lot of important milestones for the campaign: getting a Republican opponent, the first major fundraising deadline of the general election, and Democrats all across the Commonwealth getting nominated to join the ticket for "" Thank you for stepping up along the way, donating, and keeping up with the field team on the ground. We promise a lot more to come this month and beyond. We'll be opening up our online store soon, campaigning with the other Virginia Democratic nominees, and dropping more notes about Tim's love of the harmonica and the outdoors. Of course, we'll also be in a challenging general election. Hi,

Thank you.

This team really came through over the past few days and last night we hit our grassroots goal of raising $80,000 for our end-of-quarter deadline.

The news this past week made clear how critical this election will be -- and seeing so many people step up to support this campaign made clear how strong our team is too.

According to Nate Silver's website, _FiveThirtyEight_ , Minnesota will be a "state to watch" in 2018. It's going to be an action-packed few months, but I'm ready -- and I know you are, too!

I'm so grateful to have your support.

Thanks,

Amy

name: Tom Perez
subject: I am proud to share this incredible news, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
June was our best online fundraising month in nearly four years.
---
Today I am proud to say that the DNC crushed June's online fundraising goal -- in fact, June was our best online fundraising month in nearly four years! Thanks to support from hundreds of thousands of Democrats this year, our party has raised more from grassroots donors through the first half of 2018 than we have in the first half of any year since 2014 -- including last year, when Trump was inaugurated.

You may remember early 2017 as a time when millions of people around the country were taking action for the first time to resist the newly formed Trump administration. Pundits and skeptics had a lot of questions about whether grassroots Democrats would be able to keep up that level of enthusiasm -- whether we'd become numb to the horrors of the Trump presidency, get discouraged, and stop fighting back. Well, this year's grassroots fundraising numbers show that Democrats are not only matching that level of enthusiasm -- we are exceeding it.

That's something we should all be proud of. When I became chair of the DNC, it was clear we had a lot of work to do -- our organization was in pretty bad shape. Our party needed to rebuild trust with the American people. We had to recommit to our mission of electing Democrats up and down the ballot, not just those at the top of the ticket. We knew that if we were truly going to turn things around, we needed to invest in grassroots organizing, mobilization, and a voter protection infrastructure to combat the GOP's voter suppression playbook.

You've heard this before, but I'll say it again: the new DNC is doing things differently. We're providing unprecedented support to state parties because winning elections starts with investing at the local level. Plus, so far this election cycle, DNC supporters have contributed nearly $2 million directly to campaigns and organizations across the country!

I don't know about you, Derek, but right now I am filled with unrelenting optimism for what's to come this year. I see an energy among Democrats that I've never seen before -- and I am so grateful that you are part of this team.

We have the chance to take back Congress, regain majorities in state legislatures, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. We can transform our country and restore a sense of dignity to our politics -- as long as we are willing to do it together.

Thank you for being such a critical part of the Democratic Party.

All my best,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. One of the most encouraging details from our fundraising numbers is that our monthly sustainer base is up 40% this year! That means this surge of support isn't a flash in the pan -- it's the Democratic grassroots making long-term investments in the future of our party. If you're able, please consider making a monthly sustaining contribution to the Democratic Party today, Derek. It will make such a huge difference headed down the stretch to Election Day.

| | June was a difficult month, Peter. Between disappointing (and I'd go as far as to say 'disastrous') Supreme Court decisions, the news of Justice Kennedy's retirement, and all the rest, it's enough to bring anyone down. But I still have hope -- and I'll tell you why. **Because with an average online contribution of $26, we reached our $600,000 goal to keep powering this campaign.** That tells me that not only are you all-in on this race -- You're engaged. You're involved. You're still fighting like hell for the soul of this country. I'm incredibly grateful, and I'm inspired by our grassroots team. We know America is better than the country we see on the news right now. And as long as we keep fighting for our future, we will come out ahead. So thank you Peter for helping us reach this milestone. Thank you for continuing to fight beside me. And thank you for powering this campaign.
